heading: Physical fitness of officers
label: 2181 Physical fitness of officers
text: The Secretary shall prescribe regulations under which the physical fitness of officers to perform their duties shall be periodically determined.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 335 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 335 of this title
